name: vtsSetRefVoltageMode
title: vtsSetRefVoltageMode
syntax: long vtsSetRefVoltageMode (char Target[], eVTSRefVoltageMode Mode); // form 1
description: Sets the mode for the reference voltage output to control the power supply's output voltage.

parameters.name: Target
parameters.description: Name of the system variable/namespace that will be affected by this function call.

description: In order to output a control voltage (VControl) which leads to the desired output voltage VOut, the VT7001 must know the power supply factor.
In the following example, the factor of the external power supply is 0.1 and the desired output voltage VOut is 15 V.
To achieve the desired output voltage (VOut), the VT7001 calculates and sets the control voltage (VControl) automatically (1.5 V =15 * 0.1), which results in an output voltage of 15 V.
